ogTitle: Middle Pocket vs Middleton Grange: Climate Safety

heading: Middle Pocket vs Middleton Grange — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Middle Pocket, New South Wales and Middleton Grange, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Middle Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Middleton Grange (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Middle Pocket or Middleton Grange safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Middle Pocket has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Middleton Grange scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Middle Pocket scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Middleton Grange scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Middle Pocket or Middleton Grange?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Middle Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
